# OpenClaw Builder Enablement OS QA Planning Package v0.1

Created: 2026-06-02
Owner: Point
Target repo: `CharnritK/cooperative-cockpit`
Status: READY_FOR_QA_PLANNING / NOT_READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION

## Purpose

This package turns the Builder Enablement OS / SpecGraph handoff into QA planning input for Point, Codex, and human reviewers.

It validates that OpenClaw Cooperative Cockpit stays aligned to:

```text
Builder Enablement OS
→ SpecGraph as primary product artifact
→ Workbench as lens/editor
→ Nodes / locks / evidence / QA
→ Work Packets / Handoff Packets
→ Reusable patterns
```

It rejects drift into:

```text
Workbench
→ Canvas
→ Nodes
→ Chat
```

## Assimilation note

This file preserves the source QA package README. The package is now assimilated into governed repo paths, and GOAL-020A, GOAL-020B, and GOAL-020C have been executed/reworked as bounded QA documentation and no-dependency validation work.

## Boundary

The source package itself was planning-only. Repo assimilation of these QA goals does not authorize app feature work, dependency approval, backend/API/auth/database/deployment/runtime behavior, parser/LSP/MCP/connectors, real AI execution, source-code upload, repo ingestion, source-control publication, or public demo claims.
